law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts injuries or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine from twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro], or with one of these penalties alone.
If the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

Art. 399. If the blows or injuries cause illness or incapacity to perform personal labor, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and a fine from one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if he acted with premeditation.

Art. 400. The penalty is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine from two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if the blows or injuries result in an incurable seeming disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
The penalty is detention from five years to ten years if the offender acted with premeditation.

Art. 401. When the blows or injuries are intentionally inflicted, but without the aim to kill, and yet cause death, the offender shall be punished with detention from five years to ten years.
He shall be punished with detention from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those violent acts with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person

  intentionallyInflictsInjury: Person -> Bool
  hasPremeditation: Person -> Bool
  injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation: Person -> Bool
  injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill: Person -> Bool

  liableArt398: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDaysArt398: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDaysArt398: Person -> Int
  fineMinEurosArt398: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEurosArt398: Person -> Int

  liableArt399: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDaysArt399: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDaysArt399: Person -> Int
  fineMinEurosArt399: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEurosArt399: Person -> Int

  liableArt400: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDaysArt400: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDaysArt400: Person -> Int
  fineMinEurosArt400: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEurosArt400: Person -> Int
  detentionMinDaysArt400: Person -> Int
  detentionMaxDaysArt400: Person -> Int

  liableArt401: Person -> Bool
  detentionMinDaysArt401: Person -> Int
  detentionMaxDaysArt401: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  !p in Person: liableArt398(p) <=> intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDaysArt398(p) = 8.
  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDaysArt398(p) = 180.
  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEurosArt398(p) = 26.
  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEurosArt398(p) = 100.

  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDaysArt398(p) = 30.
  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDaysArt398(p) = 365.
  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEurosArt398(p) = 50.
  !p in Person: (intentionallyInflictsInjury(p) & ~injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEurosArt398(p) = 200.

  !p in Person: liableArt399(p) <=> injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDaysArt399(p) = 60.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDaysArt399(p) = 730.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEurosArt399(p) = 50.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEurosArt399(p) = 200.

  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDaysArt399(p) = 180.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDaysArt399(p) = 1095.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEurosArt399(p) = 100.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEurosArt399(p) = 500.

  !p in Person: liableArt400(p) <=> injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDaysArt400(p) = 730.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDaysArt400(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEurosArt400(p) = 200.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEurosArt400(p) = 500.

  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => detentionMinDaysArt400(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereMutilation(p) & ~injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => detentionMaxDaysArt400(p) = 3650.

  !p in Person: liableArt401(p) <=> injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  !p in Person: (injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => detentionMinDaysArt401(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & ~hasPremeditation(p)) => detentionMaxDaysArt401(p) = 3650.

  !p in Person: (injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => detentionMinDaysArt401(p) = 3650.
  !p in Person: (injuryCausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p) & hasPremeditation(p)) => detentionMaxDaysArt401(p) = 5475.
}

case.text: Jan and Marie work in the same office. After an argument, Jan waits for Marie in the parking lot and intentionally hits her with a stick. Marie breaks her arm and has to stay home for four weeks; she cannot perform her work. Jan acted with premeditation: he had brought the stick and waited for her. The injuries did not cause any incurable disease or loss of organs.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Jan is not liable under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
Yes. Jan is liable under Article 399.

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Jan?
